Text.Page: You're certainly eager to help. We're woefully low on sorcerer weapons in Lumbertown. Take these materials if you can make some discs.

These will do nicely. Can you run these out to Daven in Lumbertown?

He needs focuses...or is it foci? I can never remember.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
I'll see these discs gets some good use. Thanks!
